description_long: This is a standard hand screwdriver featuring a contoured, ergonomic handle made of dark, textured plastic with visible grip patterns for improved handling. The handle is cylindrical and tapers slightly toward the shaft, with a rounded end and a subtle hexagonal pattern for anti-slip functionality. The shaft is metallic, straight, and extends from the handle, terminating in a flathead tip suitable for slotted screws. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative elements, and the tool appears robust and well-suited for manual tasks. The surface of the handle is matte and grippy, while the metal shaft has a smooth, slightly reflective finish. There are no visible signs of wear, damage, or magnetic properties at the tip.
description: A dark, contoured plastic-handled screwdriver with a metallic flathead tip and textured grip patterns. The tool is robust, ergonomic, and shows no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded end of the contoured handle and the shaft extending away, with grip texture visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the screwdriver, highlighting the ergonomic handle and straight metal shaft with a flathead tip.
description_view_2: Tip-on view showing the flat, slotted end of the screwdriver and the handle's width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the handle's contour and the shaft's length.
attribute_handle_type: contoured, straight, textured plastic handle with anti-slip grip patterns
